title: ACT runtime-profile Link header — value pattern
description: Per PRD-101-R5 and PRD-101-R7. Pattern for the value of the HTTP Link header advertising an ACT manifest from a runtime-only deployment (gap A5). The structure follows RFC 8288: a quoted target URI in angle brackets, followed by `rel`, `type`, and `profile` parameters in any order, separated by `;` and optional whitespace. The `profile` parameter is a closed enum (PRD-101-R7): "static" or "runtime". The pattern is permissive about parameter ordering and surrounding whitespace per RFC 8288, strict about the closed `profile` enum, and verifies `rel="act"` and `type="application/act-manifest+json"` are both present.
